chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N.D- 1193 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4975/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case. 12.10.2023 M/s Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro and Najamuddin Dharejo, Special Prosecutors for NAB >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Special Prosecutor NAB Sukkur submits that since the Supreme Court has passed judgment declaring the amendments made in the NAB Law as null, void ab intio, hence he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed along with listed application as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI Judge Judge ARBROHI
